description: Using the 'Sample Order Lines' dataset in Oracle Analytics Desktop, perform data preparation and visualization for a brand analysis. Create a calculated column named 'Brand' that extracts the first word from the 'Product Name' column and a calculated column named 'City_Upper' that converts the 'City' column to uppercase. Filter the data to the 'Technology' Product Category and create a Bar Chart visualization showing 'Sales' by 'Brand'. Save the workbook as 'Brand_Analysis.dva' in the Documents folder.
